options.content:
### Intune fleet overview — graph2otel

graph2otel exports **OTLP** metrics. Grafana Cloud (Mimir/Prometheus) normalizes OTLP
metric names on ingest: dots become underscores, and unit/type suffixes may be appended
(`_total`, `_seconds`, `_ratio`, ...) depending on the OTLP-to-Prometheus pipeline
configuration. Every PromQL query below uses the underscored convention, e.g.
`intune.devices.count` → `intune_devices_count`. **Exact names depend on your
ingest pipeline config** — some setups preserve original names or omit `_total`. If a
panel reads empty, check your metric names first with `{__name__=~"intune_.*"}`.

Panels marked **(beta)** read from Intune collectors that are opt-in/experimental
(`settingsCatalog`, Autopilot profiles, update rings, driver updates, certificates).
They show no data until the corresponding beta collector is enabled — see
`docs/collectors.md` — and are not evidence of a broken dashboard.

Domain metrics (`intune.*`) carry **no** `tenant_id` label — only graph2otel's own
self-observability signals do. Panels here are therefore not tenant-scoped; a
`tenant_id` filter would match zero series. See the self-observability dashboard for
per-tenant collector health.

Every series here is a bounded aggregate (count by state/OS/policy/category) — never a
per-device or per-user series, per the cardinality boundary in `SECURITY.md`.

panels.title: Devices by compliance state
panels.description: intune.devices.count{compliance_state,operating_system}

panels.title: Device inventory overview
panels.description: intune.devices.overview.total{os}

panels.title: Encrypted devices by OS
panels.description: intune.devices.encrypted.count{operating_system}

panels.title: Enrollment type overview
panels.description: intune.devices.overview.{enrolled,mdm_enrolled,dual_enrolled}_device_count

panels.title: Device sync staleness
panels.description: intune.devices.sync_staleness_seconds{staleness_bucket}

panels.title: Mobile apps by type / publishing state
Autopilot devices by enrollment state
panels.description: beta collector — reads empty unless the Autopilot beta collector is enabled (see docs/collectors.md).

panels.title: Stale Autopilot contact by group tag
panels.description: beta collector — reads empty unless the Autopilot beta collector is enabled (see docs/collectors.md).

panels.title: Autopilot deployment profile count
panels.description: beta collector — reads empty unless the Autopilot beta collector is enabled (see docs/collectors.md).

panels.title: Update ring status by ring
panels.description: beta collector — update ring / driver update metrics read empty unless the Windows Update beta collector is enabled (see docs/collectors.md).

panels.title: Update ring pause state
panels.description: beta collector — update ring / driver update metrics read empty unless the Windows Update beta collector is enabled (see docs/collectors.md).

panels.title: Update ring pause expiry
panels.description: beta collector — update ring / driver update metrics read empty unless the Windows Update beta collector is enabled (see docs/collectors.md).

panels.title: Update ring rollback active
panels.description: beta collector — update ring / driver update metrics read empty unless the Windows Update beta collector is enabled (see docs/collectors.md).

panels.title: Driver updates pending approval
panels.description: beta collector — update ring / driver update metrics read empty unless the Windows Update beta collector is enabled (see docs/collectors.md).

panels.title: UXA score by category / health state
panels.description: intune.uxa.score{category,health_state} — average, not per-device.

panels.title: Boot time distribution by restart category
panels.description: intune.uxa.boot_time_ms histogram, p95 by restart_category.

panels.title: Login time distribution by restart category
panels.description: intune.uxa.login_time_ms histogram, p95 by restart_category.

panels.title: Malware detected devices
panels.description: Aggregate snapshot, not the audit-log event stream (see M5 WindowCollectors).

panels.title: Apple token days until expiry
panels.description: intune.apple_token.days_until_expiry{type,state,token_name} — countdown; coordinate with the alert rule in alerts/ (#30), same metric name.

panels.title: Certificate days until expiry
panels.description: beta collector — certificate state is flagged beta-api; reads empty unless the certificate collector is enabled (see docs/collectors.md). Metric name kept consistent with the alert rule in alerts/ (#30).

panels.title: Certificate state count
panels.description: beta collector — certificate state is flagged beta-api; reads empty unless the certificate collector is enabled (see docs/collectors.md). Metric name kept consistent with the alert rule in alerts/ (#30).
